meta.title: Services | INTERESTING AMERICA
meta.description: Comprehensive sports accommodation services: rooms, transfers, hospitality, and event logistics.

data.headline: Our Services
data.subheadline: Everything you need for your sports event—accommodation, transfers, and hospitality.

services.title: Accommodation
services.description: From 3-star business hotels for staff to 4-star properties for executives. We secure rooms when others say it's impossible.

services.title: Transfers
services.description: Seamless ground transportation for your teams, guests, and equipment. Airport, hotel, stadium—we connect the dots.

services.title: Hospitality
services.description: Access to tickets, suites, and premium experiences. We open doors others can't.

services.title: Event Logistics
services.description: End-to-end coordination. Rooming lists, transport schedules, on-site support—we handle the details.

data.headline: Who We Serve
data.text:
**Category 1 (Highest Revenue):** Sponsors (Visa, Adidas) and Agencies (Octagon, GMR, FUSE, iLuka)

**Category 2:** Media (SRG, ORF)—budget long-stay for crews, upscale for journalists

**Category 3:** Agencies—Gold (On Location/Beyond), Silver (Roadtrips), Bronze (ISTAA)

**Category 4:** Federations (DFB, KNVB)—Friends & Families accommodation

**Category 5:** B2C Individuals

data.headline: Ready to book?
data.text: Tell us about your event and we'll build a custom accommodation solution.
